title: Christmas Chest Fix
description: This revolutionary resource pack will fix the texture of both christmas chests that will come to you inevitably...
body:
Since the Christmas is getting really soon, I've noticed that the textures of the chests make no sense. So I fixed it! It was simple! ~~Mojang hire me!~~

To see the change, wait till the Christmas comes. Because of this, I actually don't know if it even works. But trust me.

Fixes both chests but I made a picture of only one.
![the chest(chest)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ghz0YpFD/images/c73dad70608e86616484c9f0afca8c75ca487d0b.png)
